top_patterns.description: Opens with a statement or event, then invites engagement or action.
example_quotes: Just signed petition at Missouri State to get @TOMS campus classics made.
Join me and @TOMS in raising awareness for visual impairment by wearing your shades indoors all day

top_patterns.description: Shares a quick personal note or experience, often with a location or event.
example_quotes: Shady on safari! I have been so excited for World Sight Day today
My new @toms brogue rocking at CFDA vogue fashion fund show

top_patterns.description: Expresses appreciation or acknowledgment, often with tags or mentions.
example_quotes: Thx for being such an amazing partner @tabithasimmons!!
Celebrating @TOMS Thankful Day with the TOMS family today.
Success!!!! @toms repeat, sustainable giving in Rwanda

archetypal_structures.formula: Call to action + hashtag or tag
example_quotes: Join me and @TOMS in raising awareness for visual impairment

language_habits.line_break_style: Minimal, often single lines or short phrases

example_quotes: Celebrating @TOMS Thankful Day with the TOMS family today.
Just signed petition at Missouri State to get @TOMS campus classics made.
Join me and @TOMS in raising awareness

anti_patterns: Lack of personal voice or emotion

synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: More direct calls to action, increased hashtag use
